title: Roasted Avocado Salad with Smoky Feta Crumble
description: A refreshing salad featuring roasted avocado, smoky feta crumble, and a tangy mediterranean twist.
instructions: Cut the avocado in half and remove the pit. Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the avocado in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until slightly tender.
While the avocado is roasting, mix together the red onion, smoky feta cheese, and mediterranean oregano in a bowl.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the mixture and stir to combine.
Once the avocado is done, let it cool slightly before chopping it into small pieces.
Add the chopped avocado to the bowl with the onion mixture and stir to combine.
Drizzle the olive oil over the salad and toss to coat.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve.
